title: FailSafe Host Registry Overlay
description: Operator-configurable registry of qor-logic install hosts. Merges with the built-in HOST_INSTALL_LAYOUTS in FailSafe/extension/src/qorlogic/hostLayouts.ts.

base.description: Dot-prefixed directory name under workspace root (e.g. '.windsurf').

recordPath.description: Relative path to the canonical install record file (typically '<base>/.qorlogic-installed.json').

installMap.description: Map of manifest-source-prefix to workspace-relative destination directory.

discoveryRoots.description: Directories scanned by Skill Discovery for this host.
